description: Product catalogue. PK is product_id. Name column is product_name. Category is a text string, not a FK.

chunks.text:
TABLE: products

DESCRIPTION: Product catalogue. PK is product_id. Name column is product_name. Category is a text string, not a FK.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: products, items, merchandise, goods, product catalogue, SKUs, what we sell

PRIMARY_KEY: product_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: product_id, product_name, category, brand, price, stock_quantity, description, created_at

USE_CASES: Product lookup, price queries, stock check, product performance analysis

metadata.text:
TABLE: products

DESCRIPTION: Product catalogue. PK is product_id. Name column is product_name. Category is a text string, not a FK.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: products, items, merchandise, goods, product catalogue, SKUs, what we sell

PRIMARY_KEY: product_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: product_id, product_name, category, brand, price, stock_quantity, description, created_at

USE_CASES: Product lookup, price queries, stock check, product performance analysis

chunks.text:
COLUMN: products.product_id

DESCRIPTION: Primary key. Use in JOINs: order_items.product_id = products.product_id.

DATA_TYPE: INTEGER

CONSTRAINTS: PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL
